title: Ctetrault
compiled_truth: Ctetrault is an external contact at [Vinson & Elkins](companies/vinson-elkins). Over the corpus period (1999-12-01 to 2001-07-19), Ctetrault sent 8 and received 49 emails, totalling 57 interactions. Top correspondents: [Richard B Sanders](people/richard-b-sanders) (5), [Breasoner](people/breasoner-gibbs-bruns) (4), [Mbeatty](people/mbeatty-beattylaw) (2), [Sholtzm](people/sholtzm) (2), [Steve Williams](people/steve-williams-eogresources) (2).
